SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.JavaFX

Interface NeedsSimulationState

All Known Implementing Classes:
GridController, HelloController, SaveController, TimeController
public interface NeedsSimulationState
Interface for controllers that need access to the shared SimulationState. Implementing classes should provide a method to receive the SimulationState reference.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    refreshUI()
    Optional method to refresh the UI based on the current state.
    void
    setSimulationState(SimulationState state)
    Inject the shared SimulationState so the controller can read model data.

  • Method Details

    • setSimulationState

      void setSimulationState(SimulationState state)
      Inject the shared SimulationState so the controller can read model data.
      Parameters:
      state - the SimulationState to be injected

    • refreshUI

      void refreshUI()
      Optional method to refresh the UI based on the current state.
